---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new state, animation, or interaction
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve or what experience does it add?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the new behavior, animation, or command.

## Impact Area

- [ ] Rendering / visuals
- [ ] Physics / animation
- [ ] Commands / keyboard shortcuts
- [ ] Status bar / UI
- [ ] Cross-platform support
- [ ] Performance
